shap_feature_descriptions.segment_time_sec: Segment duration (s) — model target, not an input feature
shap_feature_descriptions.avg_gradient: Mean absolute gradient of segment (0.1 = 10%) — unsigned
shap_feature_descriptions.std_gradient: Standard deviation of gradient in segment — measures terrain irregularity
shap_feature_descriptions.max_uphill_gradient: Max uphill gradient in segment (0 for non-uphill segments)
shap_feature_descriptions.max_downhill_gradient: Max downhill gradient in segment (0 for non-downhill segments)
shap_feature_descriptions.avg_elevation: Mean elevation of segment (m above sea level)
shap_feature_descriptions.uphill_cost: Uphill cost: distance * (1 + 6 * gradient) — 0 for non-uphill segments
shap_feature_descriptions.downhill_cost: Downhill cost: distance * (1 + 6 * |gradient|) — 0 for non-downhill segments
shap_feature_descriptions.cumulative_elevation: Cumulative elevation gain from activity start to end of this segment (m) — proxy for accumulated fatigue
shap_feature_descriptions.segment_energy_cost: Minetti energy cost (J/kg): 155.4*g^5 - 30.4*g^4 - 43.3*g^3 + 46.3*g^2 + 19.5*g + 3.6, multiplied by distance — validated biomechanical formula for running on slopes
shap_feature_descriptions.intensity_level: Parent activity intensity (0=recovery, 1=training, 2=race) — captures intentional effort differences
shap_feature_descriptions.is_steep_uphill: 1 if segment climbs steeply (gradient >= 30%), else 0 — marks sections where athletes walk
shap_feature_descriptions.is_steep_downhill: 1 if segment descends steeply (gradient >= 30%), else 0 — marks technical descents
